  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze weena Grah- 
ta pee ta no ta Praweeta E- 
fa/ ar scheem Waherdeem: 
fakka tas KUNGS tawa 
hwa Dahwida Deews/ ta- 
z ka tu ne effi staigajs eeksch 
va Tehwa Josawata/ un 
fch tawa Tehwa Affus/ ta 
hnina no Juhda Zelteem/ 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet effi us to Israëta 
ntan Zelteem staigajs/ un effi 
hdu un Jerusalemes Eedsih- 
tajus darrtjs maukoht/ pehz 
aba Namna Maukoschanas/ 
effi arri tawus Brahtus no 
va Tehwa Namna nokawis/ 
labbaki bija ne fa'tu pats. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi/ tad mohzibs tew 
KUNGS ar leelu Mohzibu 
taweem Laudim/ pee taweem 
hrneem/ un pee tatahm 
etwahm/ un pee wiffas tawas 
antas. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew usees arridsan lee- 
Newesfeltbas/ ka tawas Eek- 
s firgs/ teekams tawas Eek- 
s tahs Sehrgas pehz jo Dee- 
jo wairak isees. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta pamohdinaja tas 
NGS prett Joramu to Wi- 
tu un Araberu Garru/ kas 
k Mohru-Semmes dsihwo. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee zehlehs prett Juh- 
an eelausahs/ un aiswedde 
fu Mantu/ kas Kehnixa 
mmá atrasta tappe/ ir win- 
Behrnis/ un winna See- 
s/ ta ka ne weens Dehls win- 
n atlifte/ ka ween Joããs 
na masajs Dehls. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz fcho wiffa mech- 
zija to tas KUNGS winna 
Eekschás ar tahdu Sehrgu/ fo 
ne warreja dseedinaht. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas notikke jo Deenas jo 
wairak/ un kad diweju Gaddu 
Laiks bija pagahjis/ tad tsgahje 
wixxa Eekschas ar to Sehrgu/ 
ka tas no taunnahm Newesfelt- 
bahm nomirre. Un winna Laud- 
dis ne eededsinaja pahr winnu 
tahdu Dedsinatchanu/ ittin ka tee 
wixxa Tehweem bij darrifscht. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥsch bija trihsdefimits 
un diwi Gaddus wezz/ kad tas 
par Kehnizu tappe/ un waldija 
astoxus Gaddus Jerusaleme/ un 
dsihwoja (pehz) ta/ kas ne bija 
teizams/ un tee aprake to Dah- 
wida Pills/ bet ne Kehnixa Kap- 
pôs. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tee Jerusalemes Ee- 
dsihwotaji darrtja Akas- 
fiju winna masaku 
Dehlu par Kehnizu winna Wee- 
tâ. Jo Sirrotaji bija ar teem 
Arabereem Lehgeri nahkuschi/ 
un wiffus pirmajus nokawuschi/ 
ta tappe Jorama ta Kehnixa no 
Juhda Dehls Akasijus par 
Kehnizu. 
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Etchetrdefimits diwi Gad- 
dus bija Akasijus wezz/ kad tas 
par Kehnizu tappe/ un waldija 
Rrrrr weenu 
"
    }
